trans-unit.source: We could not complete this action. Please try again later.
Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
You do not have permission to perform this action.
The requested resource was not found.
The request conflicts with the current state of the resource.
Something went wrong on the server. Please try again later.
The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

trans-unit.note: API error match not found message

trans-unit.source: This quiz is no longer available.
trans-unit.note: API error match not available message

trans-unit.source: This quiz is not active yet.
trans-unit.note: API error match not active message

trans-unit.source: You already have an active attempt for this quiz.
trans-unit.note: API error active attempt exists message

trans-unit.source: The quiz attempt was not found.
trans-unit.note: API error attempt not found message

trans-unit.source: This attempt has already been submitted.
trans-unit.note: API error attempt already submitted message

trans-unit.source: The time for this attempt has expired.
This attempt is not in progress.
trans-unit.note: API error attempt not in progress message
API error question not found message

trans-unit.source: The selected option was not found.
trans-unit.note: API error option not found message

trans-unit.source: Please select an answer before continuing.

trans-unit.note: API error invalid answer payload message
API error answered at required message

trans-unit.source: You have reached the maximum number of attempts for this quiz.
trans-unit.note: API error max attempts reached message
API error course not found message
API error question bank empty message

trans-unit.source: The quiz could not be created.
trans-unit.note: API error quiz creation failed message

trans-unit.source: The match could not be created.
trans-unit.note: API error match creation failed message
API error invalid exam configuration message

trans-unit.source: The exam could not be published.
trans-unit.note: API error publish exam failed message

trans-unit.source: The content could not be uploaded.
trans-unit.note: API error content upload failed message

trans-unit.source: The selected file type is not supported.
trans-unit.note: API error unsupported file type message

trans-unit.source: Create, publish and evaluate your students' performance instantly
Generate quizzes from your classes using artificial intelligence
Create and publish quizzes ready for your classes
Evaluate and analyze your students' performance

trans-unit.source: We could not load this exam right now.

trans-unit.source: Title must be at least 3 characters.
